message: I’m here to provide information about finances to pay for your education.
It does, and when it comes to paying for your postsecondary education, you should be aware of the resources available to you including scholarships and grants.
Now we're talking! My older sister is attending college and is constantly asking my parents for money because she doesn’t follow her budget. They have threatened to cut her off.

You don’t need that kind of stress. Postsecondary institutions will have a lot of information on their websites about finding funding and managing money.  In the meantime, I have a resource to help guide you as you explore your options.

options.text: I don't know, maybe I'll think about this later. I'm still scratching the surface, you know? But thanks anyway.
I already have my finances sorted, but thanks anyway.
